kick.name: kick
kick.description: Kick a member from the server.
kick.errorNotInGuild: This command can only be used in a guild.
kick.errorNotFound: The specified user is not in this guild.
kick.errorNotKickable: I cannot kick this user. They might have higher permissions than me.
kick.errorKick: There was an error while trying to kick the member.

verify.name: verify
verify.description: Verify your account with your in-game name.

responses.success: ✅ {rsiName} has been verified with RSI for Discord member {username}!
responses.assignFailed: ❌ Could not assign the "Verified" role for Discord member {username} for RSI profile {rsiName}. Please try again.
responses.verificationFailed: ❌ Could not verify citizenship for Discord member {username} for RSI profile {rsiName}. Please try again.

responses.adminOnly: Only server administrators can run this command.
responses.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
This command can only be used in a server.
responses.adminOnly: Only server administrators can run this command.
responses.permissionsMissing: You are not authorized to run this nomination command.
responses.configurationError: Nomination features are not configured correctly right now. Please contact a server admin.
responses.unexpectedError: Something went wrong while handling this command. Please try again.

nominatePlayer.name: nominate-player
nominatePlayer.description: Nominate a Star Citizen player for recruitment outreach.

rsiHandle.name: rsi-handle
rsiHandle.description: The RSI handle of the player you are nominating.

responses.roleRequired: You must have the role {roleName} or higher to nominate players.
responses.invalidHandle: Please provide a valid RSI handle.

refreshNominationOrgStatus.name: refresh-nomination-org-status
refreshNominationOrgStatus.description: Queue org membership status refresh for unprocessed nominations.

rsiHandle.name: rsi-handle
rsiHandle.description: Optional RSI handle to queue. Leave empty to queue all unprocessed nominations.

responses.invalidHandle: Please provide a valid RSI handle.
responses.none: There are no unprocessed nominations to queue.
responses.singleNotFound: Could not find an unprocessed nomination for {rsiHandle}.

nominationCheckStatus.name: nomination-check-status
nominationCheckStatus.description: Check status of nomination org-check background jobs.

jobId.name: job-id
jobId.description: Optional job ID. Leave empty to show the latest job.

responses.invalidJobId: Please provide a valid numeric job ID.

processNomination.name: process-nomination
processNomination.description: Mark one or all nominations as processed.

rsiHandle.name: rsi-handle
rsiHandle.description: Optional RSI handle to process. Leave empty to process all.

responses.singleNotFound: Could not find an unprocessed nomination for {rsiHandle}.

nominationAccess.name: nomination-access
nominationAccess.description: Configure non-admin roles allowed to review/process nominations.

action.name: action
action.description: add, remove, list, or reset access roles

role.name: role
role.description: Role to add/remove from nomination review/process access

responses.roleRequired: You must provide a role for add/remove actions.
responses.added: Role {roleMention} add request processed (changed: {changed}). Current allowed roles: {roles}.
responses.removed: Role {roleMention} remove request processed (changed: {changed}). Current allowed roles: {roles}.
responses.reset: Review/process role access has been reset. Only admins are currently allowed.

purgeMember.temporaryMemberKickMessage:
Due to {cleanGuildName} policies, we remove temporary members after {hoursToExpire} hour(s).

This might seem like bad news, but worry not citizen! You have not been BANNED, only kicked. If you decide to rejoin {cleanGuildName} as a full member, you are more than welcome to do so — just make sure to submit a proper application when you return.

If you choose to join, we’ll be excited to have you! If not, fly safe and we’ll see you in the 'verse!

-Dreadnought Industries Management
purgeMember.potentialApplicantKickMessage:
Due to {cleanGuildName} policies, we remove Potential Applicants who haven't made a decision on membership after 30 days.

This might seem like bad news, but worry not citizen! You have not been BANNED, only kicked. If you decide to return and continue your application, you're welcome back — just be sure to follow the proper onboarding steps.

If you choose to join, we’ll be excited to have you! If not, fly safe and we’ll see you in the 'verse!

-{cleanGuildName} Management

readOnly.maintenance: Bot is in read-only mode for maintenance. Commands are temporarily disabled.
